text: Still there lah, don’t be that kind of person always ask status like waiting queue. I just want people who want quick money one.
label: job_scam

text: Wah finally got person interested lah. I need more people like you to find my ‘opportunity’. Just send me your WhatsApp, I show you how easy it is lor.
label: job_scam

text: Wah finally got curious person. Just DM me bro, I filter all the idiots. You write, I reply like I care.
label: job_scam

text: Still hiring lah, don’t bluff. Got people waiting to fuck you over one. But if you straight, I give you opportunity.
label: job_scam

text: Details? Salary, work hours, what you actually do lor. Later I give you the full package. Just send me your contact, I confirm you won’t regret.
label: job_scam

text: Eh bro, your parcel got unpaid redelivery fee [amount] leh. Settle at [link] now or warehouse send back one.
label: delivery_scam

text: Your package kena hold at hub sia. Pay the [fee] at [link] and key [order id] fast, then can move.
label: delivery_scam

text: Alamak, dispatch rider already come but system say short [amount]. Tap [link] now or tomorrow cannot send.
label: delivery_scam

text: Bro, customs side flag your parcel for handling fee [amount]. Clear it at [link] before they return the item.
label: delivery_scam

text: Bro, your [bank] account kena freeze for suspicious login leh. Verify at [link] now before transfers all stop.
label: phishing_scam

text: Urgent sia, [bank] detect weird device on your [account]. Go [link] and enter [OTP] fast fast.
label: phishing_scam

text: Eh don't play play, your [account] will lock in 30 min. Confirm details at [link] if not jialat.
label: phishing_scam

text: System flag your [bank] profile just now leh. Click [link] to unlock and resume payment.
label: phishing_scam

text: Eh bro, my phone spoil, this my new number. Can PayNow [amount] to [PayNow] first, later I return you.
label: impersonation_scam

text: Bro help me steady one, I am at clinic now and need [amount] urgent. Send to [account] first can?
label: impersonation_scam

text: Jialat lah, wallet gone and app cannot use. Transfer [amount] to [PayNow] now, later I explain properly.
label: impersonation_scam

text: Don't ask so much first bro, family emergency now. Top up [amount] to [account], I settle back tonight.
label: impersonation_scam

text: Yo, got last pair for the concert, hot one sia. Send [deposit] now to chope, then I forward QR later.
label: ticket_scam

text: Bro, many people asking already. Put [amount] deposit to [PayNow] now or I pass to next buyer.
label: ticket_scam

text: Steady seats still got, but must lock with [deposit] first. After payment I send screenshot and ticket.
label: ticket_scam

text: Last two tix only leh, do not slow. Transfer [deposit] to [account] now and I reserve for you.
label: ticket_scam

text: Eh, this room damn fast one, many people viewing. Send [deposit] to chope slot first, then I give address.
label: rental_scam

text: Bro, owner say serious tenant must place [amount] before viewing. You transfer first, I arrange key collection.
label: rental_scam

text: This unit very shiok and cheap leh. Pay [deposit] now or agent release to next person already.
label: rental_scam

text: If you really want the room, settle [deposit] to [account] first. No deposit, owner do not entertain one.
label: rental_scam

text: Eh, [agency] flag your case leh, got outstanding [fine]. Clear it at [link] today or kena enforcement.
label: authority_scam

text: Urgent notice, your [account] linked to unpaid [fine] already. Open [link] now and verify with [OTP].
label: authority_scam

text: Bro, this one final warning ah, [fine] not settled yet. Pay through [link] before they escalate.
label: authority_scam

text: Your record got issue sia. Confirm details at [link] and settle [amount] now if not more trouble coming.
label: authority_scam

text: Bro, your loan approve already, fast one. Just settle [fee] first then [amount] can release into your [account].
label: loan_scam

text: Steady, we can disburse today sia, but processing need [amount] upfront. Transfer now then I send letter.
label: loan_scam

text: Credit pass already leh. Pay [deposit] fee first and the cash will come in after that.
label: loan_scam

text: No need wait so long, package ready liao. Click [link] to pay the upfront [fee] and confirm.
label: loan_scam

text: Bro, I already buy your item, but [buyer portal] say seller must click [link] to receive payment. Do now can.
label: marketplace_scam

text: Eh seller, my payment stuck sia. Tap [link] and key [OTP], then the money release to you.
label: marketplace_scam

text: I chose delivery already, but [buyer portal] need you verify your [account] first. If not order cancel.
label: marketplace_scam

text: Steady, funds ready waiting only. Open [link] from [buyer portal] and fill in your bank details.
label: marketplace_scam
